---
title: "Welcome to My Blog"
author: "Author"
date: "2026-04-09"
categories: [news]
description: "The first post on this blog."
---

Welcome! This blog is built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org) and managed with [Nix](https://nixos.org).

## What to Expect

- Technical writing and tutorials
- Data analysis and visualizations
- Notes on tools and workflows

## The Stack

This site is rendered by Quarto and its dependencies are pinned via a Nix flake, so the build is fully reproducible.

```bash
# Enter the dev shell
nix develop

# Preview locally
quarto preview

# Build the site
quarto render
```

Stay tuned for more posts.
